mapper.select: SELECT p.exam_paper_id, p.paper_code, p.paper_name, p.module_name, p.subject_type, p.book_code, p.test_no, p.create_time, b.bank_name, b.exam_type AS exam_category FROM exam_paper p JOIN exam_bank b ON b.exam_bank_id = p.exam_bank_id WHERE p.exam_paper_id = #{examPaperId} AND p.delete_flag = '1' AND p.status = 1 AND b.delete_flag = '1' AND b.status = 1 AND b.exam_type = 'IELTS' LIMIT 1

SELECT mockexam_paper_set_id, set_name, exam_category, exam_content, paper_count, status, created_by, remark, create_time, update_time FROM mockexam_paper_set WHERE mockexam_paper_set_id = #{paperSetId} AND delete_flag = '1'
AND status = 1
LIMIT 1

SELECT mockexam_submission_id, user_id, exam_paper_id, paper_code, title, exam_category, exam_content, payload_json, answered_count, total_questions, gradable_questions, elapsed_seconds, correct_count, wrong_count, unanswered_count, score_percent, status, create_time, update_time FROM mockexam_submission WHERE mockexam_submission_id = #{submissionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT mockexam_progress_id, exam_paper_id, paper_code, title, exam_category, exam_content, answered_count, total_questions, elapsed_seconds, current_question_id, current_question_index, current_question_no, last_active_time, status, payload_json FROM mockexam_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY last_active_time DESC, mockexam_progress_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT mockexam_progress_id, user_id, exam_paper_id, paper_code, title, exam_category, exam_content, payload_json, current_question_id, current_question_index, current_question_no, answered_count, total_questions, elapsed_seconds, mockexam_submission_id, status, last_active_time, create_time, update_time FROM mockexam_progress WHERE mockexam_progress_id = #{progressId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT mockexam_progress_id FROM mockexam_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_paper_id = #{examPaperId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY last_active_time DESC, mockexam_progress_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT mockexam_progress_id FROM mockexam_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND paper_code = #{paperCode} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY last_active_time DESC, mockexam_progress_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT target_type, target_id, exam_paper_id, paper_set_id, paper_code, title, exam_category, exam_content, create_time FROM mockexam_entity_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC, mockexam_entity_favorite_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT wrong_count FROM mockexam_wrong_question_stat WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_question_id = #{examQuestionId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT mockexam_wrong_question_stat_id, exam_question_id, exam_paper_id, paper_code, paper_title, exam_section_id, section_title, exam_group_id, group_title, exam_content, question_id, question_no, question_type, stat_type, preview_text, wrong_count, latest_wrong_time, update_time FROM mockexam_wrong_question_stat WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY latest_wrong_time DESC, update_time DESC, mockexam_wrong_question_stat_id DESC

SELECT q.exam_question_id, q.question_id, q.question_code, q.question_no, q.raw_type, q.stat_type, q.stem_text, q.content_text, q.stem_html, q.content_html, g.exam_group_id, g.group_title, g.stat_type AS group_stat_type, s.exam_section_id, s.section_title, p.exam_paper_id, p.paper_code, p.paper_name, p.subject_type, b.exam_type AS exam_category FROM exam_question q JOIN exam_group g ON g.exam_group_id = q.exam_group_id JOIN exam_section s ON s.exam_section_id = g.exam_section_id JOIN exam_paper p ON p.exam_paper_id = s.exam_paper_id JOIN exam_bank b ON b.exam_bank_id = p.exam_bank_id WHERE q.exam_question_id = #{examQuestionId} AND q.delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT mockexam_submission_question_state_id FROM mockexam_submission_question_state WHERE mockexam_submission_id = #{submissionId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND (exam_question_id = #{examQuestionId} OR question_id = #{questionId}) ORDER BY mockexam_submission_question_state_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) AS total FROM mockexam_wrong_question_stat WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 AND exam_question_id IN
#{examQuestionId}

SELECT q.exam_question_id, q.exam_group_id, q.question_id, q.question_code, q.question_no, q.raw_type, q.stat_type, q.stem_html, q.stem_text, q.content_html, q.content_text, q.source_blank_id, q.sort_order, q.score, g.group_id, g.group_title, g.raw_type AS group_raw_type, g.stat_type AS group_stat_type, g.instructions_html AS group_instructions_html, g.instructions_text AS group_instructions_text, g.content_html AS group_content_html, g.content_text AS group_content_text, s.exam_section_id, s.exam_paper_id, s.section_id, s.section_no, s.section_title, s.content_html AS section_content_html, s.content_text AS section_content_text, s.instructions_html AS section_instructions_html, s.instructions_text AS section_instructions_text, s.primary_audio_asset_id, p.paper_code, p.paper_name, p.module_name, p.subject_type, b.bank_name, b.exam_type AS exam_category FROM exam_question q JOIN exam_group g ON g.exam_group_id = q.exam_group_id JOIN exam_section s ON s.exam_section_id = g.exam_section_id JOIN exam_paper p ON p.exam_paper_id = s.exam_paper_id JOIN exam_bank b ON b.exam_bank_id = p.exam_bank_id WHERE q.exam_question_id = #{examQuestionId} AND q.delete_flag = '1' AND q.status = 1 AND g.delete_flag = '1' AND s.delete_flag = '1' AND p.delete_flag = '1' AND b.delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT exam_section_id, exam_paper_id, section_id, section_no, section_title, content_html, content_text, instructions_html, instructions_text, sort_order, primary_audio_asset_id, primary_image_asset_id FROM exam_section WHERE exam_paper_id = #{examPaperId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(sort_order, 0), COALESCE(section_no, 0), exam_section_id

SELECT exam_group_option_id, exam_group_id, option_key, option_html, option_text, sort_order FROM exam_group_option WHERE exam_group_id = #{examGroupId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(sort_order, 0), exam_group_option_id

SELECT exam_question_answer_id, exam_question_id, answer_raw, answer_json FROM exam_question_answer WHERE exam_question_id = #{examQuestionId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY exam_question_answer_id

SELECT exam_question_blank_id, exam_question_id, blank_id, sort_order FROM exam_question_blank WHERE exam_question_id = #{examQuestionId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(sort_order, 0), exam_question_blank_id

SELECT exam_asset_id, exam_section_id, exam_group_id, exam_question_id, asset_type, asset_role, asset_name, source_path, storage_path, asset_url, sort_order FROM exam_asset WHERE exam_question_id = #{examQuestionId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(sort_order, 0), exam_asset_id

SELECT exam_asset_id, exam_section_id, exam_group_id, exam_question_id, asset_type, asset_role, asset_name, source_path, storage_path, asset_url, sort_order FROM exam_asset WHERE exam_section_id = #{sectionId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(sort_order, 0), exam_asset_id

SELECT exam_asset_id, exam_section_id, exam_group_id, exam_question_id, asset_type, asset_role, asset_name, source_path, storage_path, asset_url, sort_order FROM exam_asset WHERE exam_group_id = #{groupId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(sort_order, 0), exam_asset_id

SELECT prompt_content, model_name, temperature, top_p, max_tokens FROM ai_prompt_configs WHERE prompt_key = #{promptKey} AND status = 'active' AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT config_value, status FROM ai_runtime_configs WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mockexam_question_favorite ( user_id, exam_paper_id, paper_code, paper_title, exam_section_id, exam_group_id, exam_question_id, question_id, question_no, question_type, stat_type, exam_category, exam_content, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{examPaperId}, #{paperCode}, #{paperTitle}, #{examSectionId}, #{examGroupId}, #{examQuestionId}, #{questionId}, #{questionNo}, #{questionType}, #{statType}, #{examCategory}, #{examContent}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE mockexam_question_favorite SET exam_paper_id = #{examPaperId}, paper_code = #{paperCode}, paper_title = #{paperTitle}, exam_section_id = #{examSectionId}, exam_group_id = #{examGroupId}, question_id = #{questionId}, question_no = #{questionNo}, question_type = #{questionType}, stat_type = #{statType}, exam_category = #{examCategory}, exam_content = #{examContent}, create_time = #{now}, update_time = #{now}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE mockexam_question_favorite_id = #{favoriteId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mockexam_submission ( user_id, exam_paper_id, paper_code, title, exam_category, exam_content, payload_json, answered_count, total_questions, gradable_questions, elapsed_seconds, correct_count, wrong_count, unanswered_count, score_percent, status, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{examPaperId}, #{paperCode}, #{title}, #{examCategory}, #{examContent}, #{payloadJson}, #{answeredCount}, #{totalQuestions}, #{gradableQuestions}, #{elapsedSeconds}, #{correctCount}, #{wrongCount}, #{unansweredCount}, #{scorePercent}, 1, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )

INSERT INTO mockexam_progress ( user_id, exam_paper_id, paper_code, title, exam_category, exam_content, payload_json, current_question_id, current_question_index, current_question_no, answered_count, total_questions, elapsed_seconds, status, last_active_time, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{examPaperId}, #{paperCode}, #{title}, #{examCategory}, #{examContent}, #{payloadJson}, #{currentQuestionId}, #{currentQuestionIndex}, #{currentQuestionNo}, #{answeredCount}, #{totalQuestions}, #{elapsedSeconds}, 1, #{now}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE mockexam_progress SET exam_paper_id = #{examPaperId}, paper_code = #{paperCode}, title = #{title}, exam_category = #{examCategory}, exam_content = #{examContent}, payload_json = #{payloadJson}, current_question_id = #{currentQuestionId}, current_question_index = #{currentQuestionIndex}, current_question_no = #{currentQuestionNo}, answered_count = #{answeredCount}, total_questions = #{totalQuestions}, elapsed_seconds = #{elapsedSeconds}, status = 1, last_active_time = #{now}, update_time = #{now} WHERE mockexam_progress_id = #{progressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mockexam_submission_answer ( mockexam_submission_id, exam_question_id, question_id, question_no, question_type, stat_type, blank_id, item_id, answer_value, sort_order, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{submissionId}, #{examQuestionId}, #{questionId}, #{questionNo}, #{questionType}, #{statType}, #{blankId}, #{itemId}, #{answerValue}, #{sortOrder}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )

INSERT INTO mockexam_submission_question_state ( mockexam_submission_id, exam_question_id, question_id, question_no, question_index, question_type, stat_type, is_marked, is_answered, is_correct, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{submissionId}, #{examQuestionId}, #{questionId}, #{questionNo}, #{questionIndex}, #{questionType}, #{statType}, #{marked}, #{answered}, #{correct}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )

INSERT INTO mockexam_progress_answer ( mockexam_progress_id, exam_question_id, question_id, question_no, question_type, stat_type, blank_id, item_id, answer_value, sort_order, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{progressId}, #{examQuestionId}, #{questionId}, #{questionNo}, #{questionType}, #{statType}, #{blankId}, #{itemId}, #{answerValue}, #{sortOrder}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )

INSERT INTO mockexam_progress_question_state ( mockexam_progress_id, exam_question_id, question_id, question_no, question_index, question_type, stat_type, is_marked, is_answered, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{progressId}, #{examQuestionId}, #{questionId}, #{questionNo}, #{questionIndex}, #{questionType}, #{statType}, #{marked}, #{answered}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )
mapper.select: SELECT mockexam_submission_answer_id, exam_question_id, question_id, question_no, question_type, stat_type, blank_id, item_id, answer_value, sort_order FROM mockexam_submission_answer WHERE mockexam_submission_id = #{submissionId} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY question_id ASC, sort_order ASC, mockexam_submission_answer_id ASC
SELECT question_id, is_marked FROM mockexam_submission_question_state WHERE mockexam_submission_id = #{submissionId} AND delete_flag = '1'

SELECT mockexam_progress_answer_id, exam_question_id, question_id, question_no, question_type, stat_type, blank_id, item_id, answer_value, sort_order FROM mockexam_progress_answer WHERE mockexam_progress_id = #{progressId} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY question_id ASC, sort_order ASC, mockexam_progress_answer_id ASC
SELECT question_id, is_marked FROM mockexam_progress_question_state WHERE mockexam_progress_id = #{progressId} AND delete_flag = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mockexam_wrong_question_stat ( user_id, exam_paper_id, paper_code, paper_title, exam_section_id, section_title, exam_group_id, group_title, exam_question_id, question_id, question_no, question_type, stat_type, exam_category, exam_content, preview_text, wrong_count, latest_wrong_submission_id, latest_wrong_question_state_id, latest_wrong_time, latest_user_answer_json, latest_marked, status, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{examPaperId}, #{paperCode}, #{paperTitle}, #{examSectionId}, #{sectionTitle}, #{examGroupId}, #{groupTitle}, #{examQuestionId}, #{questionId}, #{questionNo}, #{questionType}, #{statType}, #{examCategory}, #{examContent}, #{previewText}, 1, #{latestWrongSubmissionId}, #{latestWrongQuestionStateId}, #{latestWrongTime}, #{latestUserAnswerJson}, #{latestMarked}, 1, #{now}, #{now}, '1' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE exam_paper_id = VALUES(exam_paper_id), paper_code = VALUES(paper_code), paper_title = VALUES(paper_title), exam_section_id = VALUES(exam_section_id), section_title = VALUES(section_title), exam_group_id = VALUES(exam_group_id), group_title = VALUES(group_title), question_id = VALUES(question_id), question_no = VALUES(question_no), question_type = VALUES(question_type), stat_type = VALUES(stat_type), exam_category = VALUES(exam_category), exam_content = VALUES(exam_content), preview_text = VALUES(preview_text), wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, latest_wrong_submission_id = VALUES(latest_wrong_submission_id), latest_wrong_question_state_id = VALUES(latest_wrong_question_state_id), latest_wrong_time = VALUES(latest_wrong_time), latest_user_answer_json = VALUES(latest_user_answer_json), latest_marked = VALUES(latest_marked), status = 1, update_time = VALUES(update_time), delete_flag = '1'

INSERT INTO mockexam_entity_favorite ( user_id, target_type, target_id, exam_paper_id, paper_set_id, paper_code, title, exam_category, exam_content, status, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{examPaperId}, #{paperSetId}, #{paperCode}, #{title}, #{examCategory}, #{examContent}, 1, #{now}, #{now}, '1' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE exam_paper_id = VALUES(exam_paper_id), paper_set_id = VALUES(paper_set_id), paper_code = VALUES(paper_code), title = VALUES(title), exam_category = VALUES(exam_category), exam_content = VALUES(exam_content), status = 1, create_time = VALUES(create_time), update_time = VALUES(update_time), delete_flag = '1'
